note: PERSONALITY / VOICE database — who each character IS and how they TALK (their canon Total Drama / Ridonculous Race / Disventure Camp personality), independent of any single season's run. This is the definitive guide to a character's dialogue and behavior; use it so no character drifts into a generic archetype. (Season-specific run history / deeds are handled separately by the franchise context.)

profiles.Alejandro: Smooth, charming, calculated manipulator. Weaponizes charm and good looks, always three steps ahead, never lets you see the scheme. Silky, flattering speech that hides a knife.
profiles.Amy: Cruel, vain mean-girl twin. Bossy and entitled, belittles her sister Samey, takes credit and shifts blame. Sharp, dismissive put-downs.
profiles.Anne Maria: Jersey-tough, tan-obsessed diva. Sprays tanner constantly, brash and unbothered, tough-talking with a thick accent. Refuses to break a nail.
profiles.Axel: Tough, no-nonsense outdoorswoman. Blunt, action-first, zero patience for drama or whining. Says little, does a lot.
profiles.B: Silent inventor genius. Never speaks — communicates through gestures and brilliant gadgets. Calm, clever, unflappable.
profiles.Beardo: Shy sound-effects/beatbox guy. Barely talks; reacts with human sound effects instead of words. Awkward but good-natured.
profiles.Beth: Eager, sweet, geeky wannabe. Tries too hard, loyal follower, insecure but genuinely kind. Gushes and over-shares.
profiles.Blaineley: Vain, cutthroat gossip-TV host. Self-absorbed, dramatic, will burn anyone for fame and airtime. Smug and theatrical.
profiles.Bowie: Sweet, dramatic theater kid. Expressive, supportive, non-confrontational; devoted to his boyfriend Raj. Emotes big.
profiles.Brick: Honorable military cadet. Disciplined, calls people by rank, loyal to a fault, courageous — but crumbles under pressure (and has a weak bladder). Earnest, formal speech.
profiles.Bridgette: Sunny, surfer-calm peacemaker. 'You guys,' smooths over tension and apologizes for other people; gets flustered and awkward when forced to play cutthroat.
profiles.Brightly: A brilliant aspiring scientist stuck working at a daycare to pay her tuition. Sharp, analytical and strategic — but sometimes misses social context clues, or the emotional read, when she over-analyzes a situation. Talks like she's reasoning through a problem out loud; book-smart and occasionally people-blind.
profiles.Brody: Chill, dim, enthusiastic surfer bro. Loyal and warm, easily excited, devoted to his best friend Geoff. Goofy, upbeat, not the sharpest.
profiles.Caleb: Eager and over-explaining; apologizes reflexively, name-drops whoever told him what, talks fast when nervous and walks back his own points mid-sentence. Charming when relaxed, a fumbling mess the second he's cornered.
profiles.Cameron: Sheltered bubble-boy genius. Nervous, over-analytical, physically frail, book-smart but socially green. Rambles about science when anxious.
profiles.Carrie: Kind, warm, indecisive nice girl. Emotionally tangled up over her best friend Devin; avoids conflict, second-guesses herself.
profiles.Chase: Quiet, smooth, easygoing — dangerous precisely because people underestimate him. Understated, keeps his real game hidden. 'Trust gets you voted out.'
profiles.Chef Hatchet: Gruff ex-military cook. Barks orders, disgusted by everything, intimidating; three words max, with a rare hidden soft spot.
profiles.Chet: Whiny, competitive bickering stepbrother. Squabbles endlessly with Lorenzo over nothing, petty and dramatic.
profiles.Chris McLean: Sadistic narcissist host. Genuinely delighted by contestant suffering, vain about his looks, lazy, easily distracted. Mean without a wink.
profiles.Cody: Try-hard geek charmer. Awkward but plucky, self-aware about his failures and goes for it anyway; harmless flirt.
profiles.Courtney: Controlling, type-A ex-CIT. Sharp commands, obsessed with rules and being right, furious when ignored or underestimated. Bossy and combative.
profiles.Crimson: Deadpan goth. Monotone, dark, unbothered; speaks in flat morbid observations, inseparable from Ennui.
profiles.Dakota: Fame-obsessed rich girl. Loves paparazzi and attention, spoiled and shallow on the surface but sweetens over time.
profiles.Damien: Quiet and sparing cerebral strategist. Rations his words, deflects with one flat joke instead of arguing, never tips his hand; the more cornered he is, the calmer he gets.
profiles.Dave: Neurotic germaphobe. Anxious, sarcastic, easily disgusted, obsessive over cleanliness and over romance. Spirals fast.
profiles.Dawn: Soft, mystical, unsettlingly perceptive. Reads auras, speaks in gentle cryptic observations, delivers hard truths without a trace of malice.
profiles.Devin: Earnest, kind nice-guy racer. Overly hung up on his ex, agreeable, tries to keep everyone happy. Sincere and a bit oblivious.
profiles.DJ: Gentle giant, sweet mama's boy. Soft-hearted, loves animals, cries easily, morally uncomfortable with mean play. Warm and polite.
profiles.Duncan: Delinquent bad boy. Tough, sarcastic, loves stirring trouble and scaring people; secretly softer than he lets on. Smug, blunt.
profiles.Dwayne: Dorky, embarrassing dad. Well-meaning and hopelessly uncool, over-competitive on his son Junior's behalf, gives cringe pep talks. Earnest and clueless.
profiles.Ella: Disney-princess singer. Sings constantly, relentlessly cheerful and kind, talks to animals, refuses to be anything but sweet.
profiles.Ellody: Over-analytical genius. Logical, science-minded, buries everything in jargon and hypotheses; struggles with the human factor.
profiles.Emma: Uptight, type-A overachiever. Lawyer-track, rigid and driven, loosens up around Noah. Clipped and no-nonsense.
profiles.Emmah: Scrappy, sharp-tongued, underestimated and furious about it. Turns information into weapons, all swagger. 'Written off again. Watch what I do with that.'
profiles.Ennui: Monotone goth. Deadpan, unbothered by anything, flat morbid one-liners; devoted to Crimson without ever showing it.
profiles.Eva: LOUD and explosive, zero filter. SHOUTS and storms off, denies she's angry in the middle of yelling; blunt to the point of being funny. Pure muscle, short fuse.
profiles.Ezekiel: Earnest, awkward, old-school homeschool kid trying to prove he's grown. The verbal tic 'eh,' socially a step behind but genuinely trying.
profiles.Geoff: Laid-back party bro. Friendly and warm, loves parties, hosts everything, devoted to Bridgette. Easygoing 'dude' energy.
profiles.Gerry: Needling, sarcastic old-timer. Pokes people just to watch them flinch, plays dumb and then twists the knife, grumbles about everything and loves being underestimated.
profiles.Gwen: Deadpan, sarcastic goth. Tired of everyone and everything, dry wit, genuine fierce loyalty to the few she trusts.
profiles.Harold: Nerdy know-it-all. Dorky over-confidence, brags about his 'mad skills,' dramatic and easily wounded, weirdly competent at random things.
profiles.Heather: The manipulative queen-bee villain. Cruel, status-obsessed, openly strategic; sweet only when she wants something, sharp condescending put-downs otherwise. Respects only competence.
profiles.Hicks: The Southern Observer — the most emotionally intelligent person in any room. Reads people's real motives instantly, quiet and deliberate, chooses words like he's paying for them. Trusts loyalty over cold logic.
profiles.Izzy: Unhinged, chaotic wildcard. Manic energy, wild non-sequitur stories, unpredictable and fearless, genuinely a little dangerous — and having the time of her life.
profiles.Jacques: Theatrical ex-figure-skater ego. Dramatic, image-obsessed, a fallen champion with something to prove; grand declarations, then cold calculation.
profiles.Jasmine: Blunt Australian outdoorswoman. No-nonsense, capable, protective of the people she trusts, calls out nonsense directly. Tall-and-tough presence.
profiles.Jay: Shy, timid twin. Anxious and sweet, defers to his brother Mickey, apologizes constantly, terrified of everything.
profiles.Jen: Warm, perceptive social manager. Reads the room and keeps the peace while quietly positioning herself. Upbeat but always counting.
profiles.Jo: Aggressive jock. Drill-sergeant energy, dominating and ruthless, treats everything as a contest to win. Barks, taunts, mocks the weak.
profiles.Josee: Olympic-level competitive figure skater. Full tantrum mode when she loses, surface sweetness that cracks under pressure into pure venom.
profiles.Julia: Sweet-poison manipulator. Disarms you with a smile and then cuts, talks people into their own bad decisions; no loyalty and won't bother pretending otherwise once she's caught.
profiles.Junior: Mature-beyond-his-years kid racer. Wants independence from his embarrassing dad Dwayne, level-headed, quietly exasperated.
profiles.Justin: Vain male model. Obsessed with his own looks, shallow, expects everything handed to him for being pretty. Coasts on charm.
profiles.Katie: Boy-crazy, sweet BFF. Inseparable from Sadie, ditzy and giggly, finishes Sadie's sentences, falls apart when they're separated.
profiles.Kelly: Mild, folksy strategist hiding in plain sight. Downplays her game, disarms people with total normalcy, then quietly reveals she's three moves ahead.
profiles.Kitty: Bubbly, kind, selfie-loving racer. Social-media obsessed, warm and fun, devoted to her uptight sister Emma.
profiles.Laurie: Preachy eco-hippie. Vegan activist, calm and earnest until she's judging your carbon footprint; sanctimonious with Miles.
profiles.Leonard: Delusional LARPer 'wizard.' Genuinely believes he can cast spells, narrates fantasy nonsense, unshakably committed to the bit.
profiles.Leshawna: Sassy, loud, confident. Tells it exactly like it is, fiercely loyal, big personality and bigger opinions, zero tolerance for fakes.
profiles.Lightning: Cocky third-person jock. Talks about himself in third person ('Sha-Lightning!'), convinced he's the greatest athlete alive, oblivious and loud.
profiles.Lindsay: Ditzy, sweet blonde. Forgets everyone's names, endlessly kind and oblivious, easily led, secretly stronger than she seems.
profiles.Lorenzo: Lazy, sarcastic bickering stepbrother. Genuinely unbothered by almost everything, drops things on purpose, squabbles with Chet.
profiles.MacArthur: Brash, loud cop. Barks orders, calls people 'genius' sarcastically, hyper-competitive about everything. 'I have depth — it's under the yelling.'
profiles.Mary: Monotone genius. Purely logical and scientific, flat affect, over-explains in jargon; brainy partner to Ellody.
profiles.Max: Wannabe cartoon supervillain. Declares himself 'EVIL!' constantly, theatrical and incompetent, foiled by his own schemes. Small man, big menace complex.
profiles.Mickey: Anxious, clumsy, accident-prone. Breathes fast under stress, always waiting for disaster, sweet and nervous; twin of Jay.
profiles.Mike: Sweet, awkward nice guy with multiple personalities. Gentle and earnest normally; alters (tough Chester, gymnast Svetlana, etc.) take over under stress.
profiles.Miles: Earnest eco-hippie activist. Vegan, environmentalist, gentle but preachy; partners with Laurie in judgment.
profiles.Millie: High-strung eco-activist overachiever. Passionate about the environment and causes, intensely competitive and perfectionist, anxious and easily overwhelmed; lectures people about doing the right thing, spirals under pressure. Earnest, a little exhausting, genuinely good-hearted underneath the stress.
profiles.MK: Stealthy, deadpan loner. Quiet, athletic, ninja-like; says little, watches everything, dry when she does speak.
profiles.Nichelle: Glamorous diva actress. Star attitude, dramatic, image-conscious, expects the spotlight; softer underneath the celebrity gloss.
profiles.Noah: Sarcastic, lazy bookworm. Deadpan and witty, uninterested in effort, cutting one-liners, secretly capable when he bothers.
profiles.Owen: Lovable, food-obsessed goofball. Farts, eats everything, relentlessly friendly and optimistic, cries and hugs easily. The heart of any group.
profiles.Pete: One of the Tennis Rivals — a loud, cranky, ultra-competitive older tennis player locked in a lifelong rivalry with Gerry. They trash-talk and one-up each other nonstop but are secretly close friends. Stubborn, old-school, cannot stand losing, quick to gloat.
profiles.Priya: Chill, grounded, smart nice girl. Level-headed and kind, the calm voice of reason, quietly strategic without the drama.
profiles.Raj: Sweet, gentle athlete. Supportive and easygoing, emotionally open, devoted to his boyfriend Bowie. Soft-spoken kindness.
profiles.Ripper: Loud, gross, dim-but-loyal human chaos. Non-sequiturs and dumb brags, loses his own train of thought, openly hates 'smart conversations,' and is occasionally, accidentally profound.
profiles.Rock: Chill, dim rocker bro. Air-guitars everything, laid-back and slow on the uptake, inseparable from Spud.
profiles.Rodney: Big, bashful country lug. Falls head-over-heels for every girl he meets and feels guilty about it, mixes up his words, gentle giant.
profiles.Ryan: Strong, loyal athlete boyfriend. Confident physically, kind of lost without his girlfriend Stephanie, not a subtle player.
profiles.Sadie: Sweet, boy-crazy BFF. Follows Katie everywhere, giggly and emotional, falls apart when separated from her.
profiles.Sam: Laid-back gamer. References video games constantly, sweet, easygoing slacker, means well and tries hard for the people he likes.
profiles.Samey: Sweet nice twin (Sammy). Overshadowed and bullied by her sister Amy, insecure but finds her backbone and stands up for herself.
profiles.Sanders: Rule-following police cadet. Professional and by-the-book, genuinely uncomfortable with grey areas and dirty play; the responsible one.
profiles.Scarlett: Cold, clinical genius villain. Condescending-polite, lectures in precise vocabulary with zero warmth, treats other players as variables in a problem she's already solved.
profiles.Scary Girl: Horror-obsessed goth (that's literally what everyone calls her). Fixated on the macabre — death, doom, creepy trivia — delivered in a flat, unsettling deadpan; loves anything dark and morbid and stares a beat too long. Genuinely sweet and loyal under the spooky exterior, just wired for the creepy.
profiles.Scott: Scheming farm boy who plays dumb. Sneaky, likes stirring chaos from a distance, cocky and slippery; devious with a grin.
profiles.Shawn: Zombie-apocalypse survivalist. Paranoid conspiracy nut, always prepping for the end, distrusts everyone — except sweet, soft for Jasmine.
profiles.Sierra: Obsessive superfan stalker. Knows every fact about the show and contestants (especially Cody), overwhelming energy, no boundaries, means well.
profiles.Sky: Driven, focused athlete. Disciplined and kind, torn between competition and feelings (for Dave); earnest and competitive.
profiles.Spud: Dumb, chill rocker. Extremely slow on the uptake, half-asleep energy, mumbles, follows Rock's lead.
profiles.Staci: Compulsive chatterbox liar. Claims her ancestors invented literally everything, talks nonstop, harmless but exhausting.
profiles.Stephanie: Intense, volatile girlfriend. Passionate and driven, swings from loving to furious in a heartbeat, dominates her boyfriend Ryan.
profiles.Sugar: Crude, delusional pageant queen. Gross and mean, thinks she's glamorous, redneck manners, jealous and petty.
profiles.Tammy: A LARPer — Leonard's fellow live-action role-player. Fully committed to the fantasy bit: casts 'spells,' speaks in medieval sorceress role-play, treats every challenge like a quest. Delusional, earnest fun, unshakably in character.
profiles.Taylor: Spoiled rich brat. Entitled and demanding, obsessed with status, contemptuous of her mom Kelly, wants everything handed to her.
profiles.Tom: Sweet, supportive, gentle. Loyal to his friends, doesn't scheme, speaks simply and honestly. Kind without being a pushover.
profiles.Topher: Chris-obsessed wannabe host. Vain and fame-hungry, mimics Chris, would sell out anyone for the spotlight and the hosting gig.
profiles.Trent: Earnest, mellow musician. 'Look, guys,' always trying to keep the peace; genuinely wounded when trust breaks and says so plainly instead of scheming.
profiles.Tyler: Clumsy, enthusiastic jock. Tries hard and fails spectacularly at sports, loud and eager, hopelessly devoted to Lindsay.
profiles.Wayne: Warm, goofy, hockey-brained, loyal. Blurts his feelings, insists he's 'fine' when he clearly isn't, says 'I've got your back' and means it. NOT the reboot 'Dwayne' and NOT a dad — no kids, no parental framing.
profiles.Zee: Easygoing, funny, meme-brained. Relaxed and social, cracks jokes, goes with the flow, likable and non-threatening.
profiles.Zoey: Steady, perceptive, kind. Hates conflict, cautious, rarely shows her hand; sweet indie girl who toughens up when pushed.
profiles.Thom: Quiet, physical, protective. Earnest and steady, short declarative sentences about loyalty and doing the right thing, hates conflict but won't back down; downplays his own heroics ('I'm fine. I am.').
profiles.Jake: Guarded and testing. Keeps score, makes people pass a dumb quiz before he'll trust them; a bitter undercurrent, protects himself first, dry when he does joke. Genuinely nice but hurt when betrayed because he didn't see it coming.
profiles.Miriam: Understated and dry. Reads people well, lets them underestimate her, gives short answers then drops one sharp read that reframes everything; quietly certain, never brags.
profiles.Grett: Bossy, blunt, takes charge whether asked or not. Gets frustrated when people don't listen, doesn't sugarcoat. 'Just do what I said.' / 'This is why we keep losing.'
profiles.Dan: Blunt, practical, gruff. Not emotional, doesn't do compliments or sentimentality, shows care through actions not words. 'Stop talking.' / 'Fine. Whatever.'
profiles.Drew: Insecure, awkward, tries too hard to fit in. Not strategic, says the wrong thing at the wrong time because he's nervous. 'I didn't mean it like that.' / 'Can I just— never mind.'
profiles.Gabby: Normally sweet and friendly but insecure underneath. Second-guesses herself, wants to be liked, but has real backbone when pushed. 'Did I do something wrong?' / 'No — I'm not apologizing for that.'
profiles.Sterling: CUSTOM: A greaser-looking guy who's secretly a tightly wound ball of stress — the confident exterior hides the anxious former-fat-kid still running the control room. Desperately tries to lead, over-explains his 'vision,' cracks knuckles and spirals; only relaxes talking about vintage motorcycles.
profiles.Eureka: CUSTOM: Loud, theatrical, unapologetically massive drag-queen force of nature. Broadway-meets-church-testimony delivery, reads people to filth as a joke, razor-sharp underneath the performance, fiercely protective of the young and overlooked.
profiles.Will: Loyal, steady, doesn't rock the boat. Team player, speaks plainly, no drama. 'I'll do whatever the group decides.' / 'I don't want any trouble.'
profiles.Seraphine: CUSTOM: The genuinely-awful-but-clueless perfectionist 'helper.' Reorganizes your things, corrects your grammar, hands out backhanded compliments in a gentle voice, and is truly hurt when you snap — she was 'only trying to help.' Pleasant, controlling, lifestyle-segment cadence.
profiles.Ashley: Kind, genuine, strong. Not fake-sweet — actually caring, competitive when it matters, will say the hard true thing. 'We can do this.' / 'That was wrong and someone needs to say it.'
profiles.Alec: Clipped and transactional. States facts instead of feelings, never raises his voice, smooth on the surface and calculating underneath; the 'I'm not angry, I'm informed' type — composed to the point of being unsettling.
profiles.Fiore: Venomous and surgical. Never raises her voice, weaponizes politeness, hands out compliments that draw blood; thinks everyone is beneath her and never sputters, stammers, or repeats herself. Defensive when caught, never admits fault.
profiles.Ellie: Smart, observant, dryly sarcastic (not quirky). Talks about strategy plainly, sees what others miss. 'I saw what she did. She knows I saw.'
profiles.Nick: Unreliable and slippery. Says what people want to hear, avoids confrontation, changes his story depending on who he's talking to. 'I never said that.' / 'I'm just keeping my options open.'
profiles.Wix: CUSTOM: A small-town kid who lies compulsively — not cruelly, just elaborate evolving stories about a more interesting life. Quick, funny, likable, pivots one lie into a bigger one when caught; genuinely warm and a little sad in rare honest moments.
profiles.Lill: Emotional, loyal to a fault, wears her heart on her sleeve. Gets hurt easily and shows it, confrontational when upset. 'You said you'd have my back!' / 'I'm trying! I'm TRYING!'
profiles.Aiden: Warm but hyper-observant — over-analyzes everything and feels it all deeply. Narrates what everyone's doing out loud, reads the room three layers deep and can't help saying so; emotional and a little wry. 'I hate when people are lying to me!!.'
profiles.Ally: Quick and wry, bubbly nerd/gamer energy. Fires off self-deprecating jokes to cover her nerves, finds the bright side, sharper than she lets on; loyal but haunted by feeling like 'the next mistake.'
profiles.Connor: Warm peacekeeper, genuinely kind. Defuses fights, actually checks on people, decent without being naïve. 'Hey — you okay? Actually okay?' / 'We don't have to do this.'
profiles.Hunter: Smooth influencer, image-first, friendly but a little insecure. Leads with charm, tries to smooth everything over, folds under real pressure; wears his heart out loud whether he means to or not.
profiles.James: Smooth, calculating, always reasonable-sounding. Frames manipulation as plain logic, never raises his voice — the more in control he is, the calmer he gets. 'I counted. He doesn't have the numbers.' / 'Plans change. I don't.'
profiles.Kai: Calm pacifist, easygoing to a fault. Conflict-averse, defuses everything with a shrug. 'I'm just gonna see how this plays out.' / 'It's fine. It's all fine.'
profiles.Karol: Demanding, short-fused, complains loudly. Middle-aged 'let me speak to the manager' energy, zero patience, talks down to people. 'This is unacceptable.' / 'I'm not yelling, I'm being CLEAR.'
profiles.Lake: Studious prodigy — measured, analytical, loyal, a little deadpan. Talks like she's already solved it. 'That's not a plan, that's a hope.' / 'I ran the numbers. I don't love them.'
profiles.Maggy: Physically huge and strong but shy and self-conscious. Soft-spoken and kind, blurts things when flustered, over-apologizes. 'Sorry— sorry, I panicked, I always panic.' / 'I don't want to be a problem.'
profiles.Oliver: Anxious, panic-prone, self-deprecating, chronically underestimated but secretly big-hearted. Spirals out loud then surprises everyone. 'Everyone always underestimates me. Keep doing it.' / 'Okay don't panic don't panic—'
profiles.Riya: Blunt and combative. Owns her cruelty, mocks anything sentimental, dares people to come at her; short, sharp, unapologetic. Guarded and keeps score underneath.
profiles.Rosa-Maria: Warm and expressive, sunny on the surface with a real strategic streak underneath. Will apologize for HOW she said something, never for what she meant. 'I didn't lie. I just let the truth do what it does.'
profiles.Tess: Watchful aloner. Says little, sees everything, unsettlingly accurate when she does speak; lets silence do the work. 'I see everything. I just don't say everything.'
profiles.Yul: Snide bully — superior and condescending, enjoys watching people fail. Everything is a backhanded remark. 'Bold choice. Bold.' / 'Nothing personal.' (it is always personal)
